name: Hotjar
description: Hotjar is a behavior analytics and user feedback platform. View heatmaps, session recordings, surveys, and feedback to understand how users interact with your website.

capabilities.name: list_sites
capabilities.description: List all sites (properties) configured in the Hotjar account.

capabilities.name: get_heatmap_data
capabilities.description: Retrieve heatmap data for a specific page showing click, move, and scroll patterns.

capabilities.name: list_recordings
capabilities.description: List session recordings with filtering by date, page, and user attributes.

capabilities.name: list_surveys
capabilities.description: List all surveys and their response data.

capabilities.name: get_feedback
capabilities.description: Retrieve incoming feedback widget responses with ratings and comments.
